source: Han B, Zeng H, Chen W, et al. Cancer incidence and mortality in China, 2022. J Natl Cancer Center 2024 (PMID 39036382; National Cancer Center of China).

cancers.name: Lung cancer
cancers.prevention: tobacco control / smoking cessation (the dominant modifiable risk)
cancers.china_note: China's #1 cancer for both new cases and deaths. EGFR-activating mutations are far more common in East-Asian/Chinese NSCLC (~38–53%) than Western (~10–15%), so EGFR-targeted therapy reaches a disproportionately large share of Chinese patients.

cancers.name: Liver cancer (HCC)
cancers.driver: chronic hepatitis B (HBV); aflatoxin, alcohol, NAFLD
cancers.prevention: HBV vaccination — prevents the chronic infection behind most Chinese HCC (the first 'anti-cancer vaccine'; WHO/IARC); plus antiviral treatment of chronic HBV
cancers.china_note: Disproportionately a Chinese disease via endemic HBV. Prevention (HBV vaccination) is the proven, highest-impact lever; HCC is hard to target with small molecules — FGFR4 (FGF19–FGFR4 axis) is the most selective emerging target.

cancers.name: Stomach (gastric) cancer
cancers.prevention: H. pylori test-and-treat — eradicating an IARC class-1 carcinogen lowers gastric-cancer risk (Choi, NEJM 2020; Cochrane)
cancers.china_note: Among the highest national burdens worldwide; H. pylori eradication is the proven prevention lever. Targetable subsets: HER2/ERBB2, FGFR2.

cancers.name: Colorectal cancer
cancers.driver: diet/lifestyle, obesity; incidence rising in China
cancers.prevention: screening (colonoscopy / FIT) with adenoma removal — interrupts the adenoma→carcinoma sequence
cancers.china_note: 2nd most common new cancer in China (2022) and rising — a growing target population (KRAS/NRAS/BRAF/EGFR biology).

cancers.name: Oesophageal cancer
cancers.driver: hot beverages, alcohol/tobacco, diet; regional 'cancer belts'
cancers.prevention: avoid very-hot beverages, tobacco and heavy alcohol; address the regional risk factors
cancers.china_note: China carries a very large share of the world's oesophageal cancer; mostly squamous histology, with limited targeted-therapy options today — prevention dominates.

cancers.name: Breast cancer
cancers.driver: the leading cancer in Chinese women by incidence
cancers.china_note: Top cancer in women; large target population (HER2/PIK3CA/ER biology).

prevention_readout: For Liver cancer (HCC), Oesophageal cancer the proven, highest-impact lever in China is prevention (HBV vaccination; reducing exposures), not a new small molecule — these cancers are hard to drug. Lung, colorectal, gastric and breast carry genuine small-molecule target biology, which is where this pipeline contributes most.
disclaimer: National 2022 estimates (Han et al.), not per-program forecasts; the target↔cancer mapping is a relevance heuristic, not a claim a target cures that cancer. Research only; not medical advice. 仅供研究，非医疗建议。

labs.name: Viva Biotech 维亚生物
labs.note: SPR/biophysical binding, X-ray co-crystallography & biochemical IC50 on a structure-based (SBDD) platform — Shanghai

labs.name: WuXi AppTec 药明康德 (WuXi Biology)
labs.note: biochemical & binding assays across an integrated biology platform — Shanghai

labs.name: GenScript 金斯瑞
labs.note: gene synthesis + recombinant protein/peptide production to make the purified target for binding assays — Nanjing

labs.name: Pharmaron 康龙化成
labs.note: in-vitro biology incl. kinase profiling & biochemistry for off-target / selectivity panels — Beijing

bench_path_cn.title: Engage the target in a cell

labs.name: Crown Bioscience 冠科生物
labs.note: oncology cell assays across 1000+ cancer cell lines; viability & target-engagement — Suzhou/Taicang

labs.name: ChemPartner 睿智医药
labs.note: in-vitro pharmacology — oncology functional & cell-based assays — Shanghai

labs.name: Pharmaron 康龙化成 (DMPK)
labs.note: in-vitro ADMET (liver microsomes, hERG, Caco-2) + in-vivo PK — Beijing/Ningbo

labs.name: Crown Bioscience 冠科生物
labs.note: in-vivo oncology efficacy — 2,500+ PDX and 200+ CDX models — Suzhou/Taicang

labs.name: SIMM 上海药物所 (CAS) / National Center for Drug Screening 国家新药筛选中心
labs.note: academic drug-discovery collaboration & high-throughput screening route (not fee-for-service) — Shanghai

suppliers_cn.name: MedChemExpress (MCE)
suppliers_cn.note: large bioactive small-molecule & inhibitor catalog + screening libraries — Shanghai

suppliers_cn.name: Selleck Chemicals (Selleckchem)
suppliers_cn.note: pathway-specific inhibitors & screening libraries (incl. PI3K/Akt/mTOR) — China site selleck.cn

suppliers_cn.name: Bide Pharmatech (Bidepharm)
suppliers_cn.note: building blocks & screening compounds for sourcing/synthesis — Shanghai

suppliers_note_cn: Many known ChEMBL actives are catalog items — search each candidate by structure or ChEMBL ID on a domestic supplier to see if it can be PURCHASED (no synthesis, no import) before commissioning a CRO. Availability and price are per-compound; confirm directly — do not assume stock.

registry_cn.name: ChiCTR 中国临床试验注册中心
registry_cn.note: China's primary clinical-trial registry (WHO ICTRP primary registry)

region_note_cn: Bench routes below are mainland-China CROs (no cross-border compound shipping, domestic invoicing, Chinese-language contact). Capabilities were verified against each company's own site; confirm current scope, eligibility and pricing directly.
reachability_note_cn: Inside China: run this locally — `python3 cad/run_pipeline.py …` then `python3 cad/validation_package.py --run <dir> --region cn`. The hosted site (Firebase/Google) may be blocked; the CLI and these files are not. For the optional plain-language layer use DeepSeek (China-accessible): set DEEPSEEK_API_KEY and run cad/explain.py.
